name: Zero Risk — Phase Gate Evidence Collector (Webhook)

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "agent": "editor-en-jefe",
  "task_type": "phase_gate_qc",
  "phase": "{{ $json.phase_name }}",
  "phase_output": "{{ $json.phase_output }}",
  "success_criteria": "{{ typeof $json.success_criteria === 'string' ? $json.success_criteria : $json.success_criteria.join('; ') }}",
  "validation_instruction": "Evaluate this phase output against the success criteria. Check for: (1) Brand voice alignment (if copywriting phase), (2) Factual accuracy, (3) Completeness vs criteria, (4) Strategic fit. Return structured JSON: {issues: [...], severity: low|medium|high|critical, verdict: PASS|RETRY|FAIL, rationale, evidence_summary}"
}
